subcodes.first_line: O divine verse! Verily the lights have dawned, and the glad-tidings have appeared, and the signs have been fulfilled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الایه الربانیه ان الانوار قد اشرقت و ان البشارات قد ظهرت و ان الاشارات قد تحققت
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
